creator: minsoochoo0122@proton.me
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #2)
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/fdp-primer/writing-style/#writing-style-be-clear>

"Write in a formal style. Avoid addressing the reader as "you". For example, say "copy the file to /tmp" rather than "you can copy the file to /tmp"."

So "You may prefer to use" should be avoided
